welcome.title: Welcome to Hagicode Desktop
welcome.description: Hagicode Desktop is the local launcher for Hagicode. We will finish first-time setup and compliance confirmation in five steps.

manage.title: Version Management
manage.description: Manage Hagicode Server installation and updates

monitor.title: Service Monitoring
monitor.description: Start, stop, and monitor service status

steps.welcome: Review the setup and what will happen next
steps.download: Download the latest Hagicode Server package
steps.launch: Start the service and confirm it is running
steps.dependencyPreparation: Confirm required dependencies and Agent CLI packages are ready
steps.sharingAcceleration: Confirm whether shared acceleration should stay enabled by default
steps.legalConsent: Confirm the current EULA and Privacy Policy revisions, then review the official pages in your browser

complete.title: Download Complete!
complete.message: The package was verified successfully. You can now return to the homepage and start the service manually whenever you are ready.

dependencies.title: Install System Dependencies
dependencies.subtitle: Hagicode requires certain system dependencies to function properly.
dependencies.description: Check the installation status of system dependencies

complete.title: Dependencies Installed
complete.message: All dependencies have been successfully installed.

error.message: Some dependencies failed to install. Please install them manually and continue.

manualHandoff.title: Desktop ships Node.js and npm, but the bundled CLI packages now need a manual install step.
manualHandoff.description: Run the suggested command outside Desktop, then refresh the dependency status here.
manualHandoff.refreshHint: Refresh after the command finishes to re-check the bundled toolchain.

depInstallConfirm.title: Install Missing Dependencies
depInstallConfirm.versionMismatchNote: Some dependencies have incorrect versions and need to be upgraded.
depInstallConfirm.mixedMissingMessage: Detected {{missing}} missing and {{mismatch}} version mismatched dependency
depInstallConfirm.mixedMissingMessage_other: Detected {{missing}} missing and {{mismatch}} version mismatched dependencies
depInstallConfirm.upgradeNote: Version mismatched dependencies will be upgraded to the required version.
depInstallConfirm.permissionWarning: Installing these dependencies may require administrator privileges.

complete.title: Setup Complete!
complete.subtitle: Hagicode Desktop has been successfully installed and started.
complete.success: Congratulations! Hagicode Desktop has been successfully installed and started.
complete.ready: You can now start using all features.

whatsNext.title: You can now:
whatsNext.manage: Manage Hagicode Server from the main interface

failure.title: Startup Failed
failure.subtitle: Hagicode Server could not finish starting. Review the diagnostics and reinstall before continuing setup.
failure.guidance: Open the full log, then reinstall the current version and restart the setup flow.
failure.emptySummary: No startup failure summary was captured
failure.emptyLog: No startup failure log was captured
failure.truncatedHint: The startup log was truncated to the most recent output.
failure.recoveryHint: We recommend reinstalling the current version and resetting onboarding before trying setup again.
failure.copyError: Failed to copy startup failure log
failure.copyEmpty: There is no startup failure log to copy

skip.title: Confirm Skip Setup
skip.description: Are you sure you want to skip the first-time setup?
skip.manualInstallNote:
After skipping, you can:
• Manually install Hagicode Server through "Package Management" in the main interface
• Re-enable the setup process in settings
skip.reenableNote: If this is your first time using Hagicode Desktop, we recommend completing the setup process.

manualHandoff.title: Desktop ships Node.js and npm, but this CLI package now requires a manual install step.
manualHandoff.description: Run the suggested command outside Desktop, then refresh the dependency status here.
manualHandoff.refreshHint: Refresh after the command finishes to re-check the bundled toolchain.

dependencyCheck.title: Dependency Check Results
dependencyCheck.summary: Checked {{total}} {{total, plural, =1 {dependency} other {dependencies}}}, {{passed}} {{passed, plural, =1 {passed} other {passed}}}, {{failed}} {{failed, plural, =1 {needs attention} other {need attention}}}

sharingAcceleration.title: Download & Sharing Acceleration
sharingAcceleration.description: Enabled by default. Latest desktop/server assets with torrent metadata start from torrent first and fall back automatically.
sharingAcceleration.toggleDescription: You can disable it here first and adjust it later in Settings.

bullets.latest: External seeding stays focused on latest desktop and latest server assets
bullets.fallback: If the torrent sidecar is missing or the handshake fails, fallback backfill starts automatically
bullets.disable: Disable it now if your network is restricted or you do not want to share
bullets.portable: Portable mode forces this feature off and never seeds implicitly

dependencyPreparation.title: Prepare Dependencies
dependencyPreparation.description: Install the command-line dependencies required by HagiCode Desktop and select at least one Agent CLI to use with coding sessions.

environment.title: Desktop-managed Node/npm environment
environment.description: This step uses HagiCode Desktop's bundled Node/npm environment. System-installed Node/npm or globally installed CLI tools do not satisfy readiness unless they are installed into Desktop's managed environment.

required.title: Required dependencies
required.description: These dependencies must be installed before setup can continue.

optional.title: Optional dependencies
optional.description: Optional dependencies do not block setup.

agentCli.title: Agent CLI selection
agentCli.description: Select at least one Agent CLI. The selected CLI must be installed in Desktop's managed npm environment.

environment-unavailable.title: Node/npm environment unavailable
environment-unavailable.description: Desktop cannot access its managed Node/npm environment. Refresh after the bundled toolchain is available.

required-packages-missing.title: Required dependencies are missing
required-packages-missing.description: Install the missing required dependencies before continuing.

agent-cli-not-selected.title: Select an Agent CLI
agent-cli-not-selected.description: Choose at least one supported Agent CLI dependency.

agent-cli-not-installed.title: Selected Agent CLI is not installed
agent-cli-not-installed.description: Install at least one selected Agent CLI package into Desktop's managed npm environment.

complete.title: Dependencies are ready
complete.description: Required dependencies are installed and at least one selected Agent CLI is ready.

legal.title: End User License Agreement and Privacy Policy
legal.descriptionFull: Before downloading HagiCode Server, confirm the current EULA and Privacy Policy revisions. The official documents open in your default browser.
legal.descriptionLegalOnly: The current legal revisions have not been accepted yet. Review the official documents in your default browser, then return to Desktop to confirm.
legal.progressFull: Full setup: Welcome -> Legal Consent -> Sharing Acceleration -> Download
legal.progressLegalOnly: Compliance gate mode: only the current legal consent step is shown
legal.browserInstruction: Open the official documents in your default browser before you accept. Desktop only shows the revision summary, not the full legal text.
legal.cacheHint: You are currently seeing the most recent successfully cached legal summary. Refresh after network recovery to confirm whether a newer revision exists.
legal.unavailableHint: The legal revision summary is unavailable and no cached copy is available yet. Check your network and try again; setup cannot continue until valid metadata is loaded.
legal.reviewPrompt: After reviewing the official page, return to Desktop and confirm your acceptance.
legal.checkbox: I have reviewed the current EULA and Privacy Policy in the browser and agree to them.
legal.modeHintFull: After acceptance, setup continues to sharing acceleration and download.
legal.modeHintLegalOnly: After acceptance, the gate closes and the main interface resumes; declining exits the current app session.

metadata.cache: Using the last successful cached legal metadata
